description: Workflow for documenting standby generator installation from site arrival through final export.

stages.description: Collect job, customer, site, and scope context before field work begins.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Add a short summary of generator size, fuel type, transfer switch scope, and any known constraints.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Example: Install 24kW standby generator with ATS, natural gas connection by others.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Add a short summary of generator size, fuel type, transfer switch scope, and any known constraints.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Agregue un resumen breve del tamaño del generador, tipo de combustible, alcance del interruptor de transferencia y cualquier restricción conocida.

checklist_items.description: Confirm the jobsite ZIP because permit, inspection, utility, and AHJ rules should follow the jobsite location, not only the business ZIP.

description_i18n.en: Confirm the jobsite ZIP because permit, inspection, utility, and AHJ rules should follow the jobsite location, not only the business ZIP.
description_i18n.es: Confirme el código postal del sitio porque las reglas de permisos, inspección, servicios y autoridad competente deben seguir la ubicación del trabajo, no solo el código postal del negocio.

checklist_items.description: Confirm whether permit has been pulled, is pending, not required, or needs office review.

description_i18n.en: Confirm whether permit has been pulled, is pending, not required, or needs office review.
description_i18n.es: Confirme si el permiso fue obtenido, está pendiente, no es requerido o necesita revisión de oficina.

description_i18n.en: Collect job, customer, site, and scope context before field work begins.
description_i18n.es: Recopile el contexto del trabajo, cliente, sitio y alcance antes de comenzar el trabajo en campo.

stages.description: Confirm jobsite location and capture initial site context.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture GPS check-in when arriving at the jobsite.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Use last known location if signal is weak, then mark as offline location lock.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture GPS check-in when arriving at the jobsite.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture el registro GPS al llegar al sitio.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Take a wide photo showing the work area before starting.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Include driveway, proposed generator area, and access path if possible.

display_name_i18n.es: Vista general del sitio al llegar

field_instruction_i18n.en: Take a wide photo showing the work area before starting.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Tome una foto amplia que muestre el área de trabajo antes de comenzar.

description_i18n.en: Confirm jobsite location and capture initial site context.
description_i18n.es: Confirme la ubicación del sitio y capture el contexto inicial.

stages.description: Capture before-work evidence for service equipment and installation area.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Take a clear photo of the electric meter before work begins.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Include meter face and surrounding service equipment.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Take a clear photo of the electric meter before work begins.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Tome una foto clara del medidor eléctrico antes de comenzar el trabajo.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Take a clear photo of the main panel before work begins.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Open panel only if safe and allowed. Capture labels if visible.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Take a clear photo of the main panel before work begins.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Tome una foto clara del panel principal antes de comenzar el trabajo.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture the proposed generator location before installation.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Show nearby walls, openings, grade, pad area, and access path.
compliance_notes: Clearance requirements vary by manufacturer, fuel type, and jurisdiction. Verify with AHJ and manufacturer documentation.

display_name_i18n.es: Ubicación propuesta del generador antes del trabajo

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture the proposed generator location before installation.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture la ubicación propuesta del generador antes de la instalación.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture fences, landscaping, windows, vents, slopes, drainage, or access constraints that may affect installation.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Take multiple angles if the site is tight or clearance may be questioned.

display_name_i18n.es: Obstrucciones existentes o restricciones del sitio

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture fences, landscaping, windows, vents, slopes, drainage, or access constraints that may affect installation.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture cercas, jardinería, ventanas, ventilaciones, pendientes, drenaje o restricciones de acceso que puedan afectar la instalación.

description_i18n.en: Capture before-work evidence for service equipment and installation area.
description_i18n.es: Capture evidencia previa al trabajo del equipo de servicio y del área de instalación.

stages.description: Document installation progress, hidden work, and important field conditions.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture the generator pad/base before generator placement when possible.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Show pad position, grade, and surrounding clearance.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture the generator pad/base before generator placement when possible.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture la base del generador antes de colocarlo cuando sea posible.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture installed transfer switch and surrounding equipment.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Include labels, conduit entries, and work area context.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture installed transfer switch and surrounding equipment.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture el interruptor de transferencia instalado y el equipo circundante.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture conduit routing before it becomes hidden or hard to inspect.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Show path, transitions, penetrations, and protection.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture conduit routing before it becomes hidden or hard to inspect.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture la ruta del conducto antes de que quede oculta o difícil de inspeccionar.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture fuel connection if included in scope.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Show connection area, shutoff location, and any relevant labels.
compliance_notes: Fuel requirements vary by fuel type and jurisdiction. Verify with qualified gas/fuel contractor and AHJ.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture fuel connection if included in scope.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture la conexión de combustible si está incluida en el alcance.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture grounding or bonding detail when visible and safe to document.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Show connection points, labels, and surrounding equipment context.
compliance_notes: Grounding and bonding requirements depend on system design, code adoption, and AHJ interpretation. Verify locally.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture grounding or bonding detail when visible and safe to document.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture el detalle de puesta a tierra o unión cuando sea visible y seguro documentarlo.

checklist_items.description: Confirm whether extra trenching, relocation, repair, or customer-requested changes occurred.

description_i18n.en: Confirm whether extra trenching, relocation, repair, or customer-requested changes occurred.
description_i18n.es: Confirme si hubo zanjeo adicional, reubicación, reparación o cambios solicitados por el cliente.

description_i18n.en: Document installation progress, hidden work, and important field conditions.
description_i18n.es: Documente el avance de la instalación, trabajo oculto y condiciones importantes en campo.

stages.description: Capture closeout proof needed for inspection and permit records.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture final installed generator from multiple angles.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Show finished install, clearance context, and surroundings.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture final installed generator from multiple angles.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture el generador instalado final desde varios ángulos.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture or enter generator model and serial number.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Take a clear photo of manufacturer nameplate if available.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture or enter generator model and serial number.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture o ingrese el modelo y número de serie del generador.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Document startup or test result if performed.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Add photo, note, or measurement showing test/startup outcome.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Document startup or test result if performed.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Documente el arranque o resultado de prueba si se realizó.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Attach or photograph permit card, inspection tag, or related jobsite document if available.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Attach or photograph permit card, inspection tag, or related jobsite document if available.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Adjunte o fotografíe la tarjeta de permiso, etiqueta de inspección o documento relacionado del sitio si está disponible.

checklist_items.description: Confirm all required photos are captured before generating inspector report.

description_i18n.en: Confirm all required photos are captured before generating inspector report.
description_i18n.es: Confirme que todas las fotos requeridas estén capturadas antes de generar el reporte para inspector.

description_i18n.en: Capture closeout proof needed for inspection and permit records.
description_i18n.es: Capture la evidencia de cierre necesaria para inspección y registros de permisos.

stages.description: Capture customer-facing completion proof and signoff.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Record a short note summarizing customer walkthrough or closeout status.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Mention any customer instructions, warranty explanation, or remaining items.

display_name_i18n.es: Nota de recorrido con el cliente

field_instruction_i18n.en: Record a short note summarizing customer walkthrough or closeout status.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Registre una nota breve que resuma el recorrido con el cliente o el estado de cierre.

proof_requirements.field_instruction: Capture customer signoff if required by company workflow.
proof_requirements.capture_hint: Use when work is complete or when customer acknowledges documentation.

field_instruction_i18n.en: Capture customer signoff if required by company workflow.
field_instruction_i18n.es: Capture la firma del cliente si el flujo de la empresa lo requiere.

description_i18n.en: Capture customer-facing completion proof and signoff.
description_i18n.es: Capture evidencia de finalización para el cliente y la firma de cierre.

stages.description: Generate documentation reports and confirm local/offline archive status.

checklist_items.description: Generate customer-facing completion documentation when appropriate.

description_i18n.en: Generate customer-facing completion documentation when appropriate.
description_i18n.es: Genere documentación de finalización para el cliente cuando corresponda.

checklist_items.description: Confirm whether job is saved locally, waiting for internet, uploading, backed up, or needs attention.

description_i18n.en: Confirm whether job is saved locally, waiting for internet, uploading, backed up, or needs attention.
description_i18n.es: Confirme si el trabajo está guardado localmente, esperando internet, cargando, respaldado o necesita atención.

description_i18n.en: Generate documentation reports and confirm local/offline archive status.
description_i18n.es: Genere reportes de documentación y confirme el estado del archivo local/sin conexión.

export_profiles.description: Equipment, serial number, and install documentation for warranty records.
Complete internal job record with all proof, notes, timeline, and warnings.

validation_rule.display_message: Jobsite ZIP may fall under a different AHJ than business ZIP. Verify permit and inspection requirements for the jobsite location.
validation_rule.recommended_action: Review jobsite AHJ, permit office, utility provider, and inspection scheduling requirements.

proof_requirement.field_instruction: Capture clear photo of generator anchoring detail before final closeout.
proof_requirement.capture_hint: Show fastening/anchoring detail and surrounding base context.
compliance_notes: Wind-zone anchoring requirements vary by jurisdiction, manufacturer, and site condition. Verify with AHJ.

validation_rules.display_message: Inspector report requires all required inspector proof items before export.
validation_rules.recommended_action: Capture missing required proof or document why it was skipped if allowed.

validation_rules.display_message: One or more required photos may be blurry, dark, or hard to verify.
validation_rules.recommended_action: Retake the photo before leaving the jobsite.

validation_rules.display_message: One or more required photos is missing GPS data.
validation_rules.recommended_action: Retake proof with location enabled or add an offline location note.

description_i18n.en: Workflow for documenting standby generator installation from site arrival through final export.
description_i18n.es: Flujo de trabajo para documentar la instalación de un generador de respaldo desde la llegada al sitio hasta la exportación final.
